text.tspan: (K8s pod, ECS task, Nomad allocation, VM)
PROPERTIES of running sidecar in the same pod:
u2022 SHARED LIFECYCLE u2014 they start and stop together
u2022 SHARED NETWORK u2014 talk via localhost (no network hop overhead)
u2022 SHARED VOLUME u2014 can exchange files
u2022 SEPARATE PROCESSES u2014 own crashes don't take down each other (mostly)
u2022 LANGUAGE-AGNOSTIC u2014 sidecar can be Go even if app is Python
u2022 INDEPENDENTLY UPGRADABLE u2014 bump sidecar without rebuilding app image
u2022 log shipper (Fluent Bit u2192 ELK)
